visual_description: A man in a dark suit and striped tie stands in front of a wall covered in maps and notes, speaking with a serious expression. The camera then cuts to a wider shot showing three men in suits standing together in an office environment, looking forward with focused expressions. The man in the center wears a dark jacket over a light shirt, while the man on the right wears a light-colored shirt and a lanyard.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese with a serious and authoritative tone, delivering what sounds like an official briefing or instruction.
